headline: Johnson & Johnson Financial Chief Sees ‘Clear Line of Sight’ to Double-Digit Growth by 2030
summary: Johnson & Johnson  has reinvented itself several times in recent years.  Its latest earnings report signals the company has reinvented itself again.  J&J posted adjusted earnings of $2.70 a share for the first quarter, narrowly beating out the $2.68 a share analysts had anticipated.

headline: Johnson & Johnson Beats Earnings Estimates. Cancer Treatments Help Drive the Quarter.
summary: Johnson & Johnson  has reinvented itself several times in recent years.  J&J posted adjusted earnings of $2.70 a share for the first quarter, narrowly beating out the $2.68 a share analysts had anticipated.  Sales grew by more than 11% in J&J’s Innovative Medicine arm, which includes its oncology portfolio, and 7.7% in its medical technology division.

headline: Johnson & Johnson Stock Rises on Earnings Beat. These Segments Boosted the Quarter.
summary: Johnson & Johnson  stock gained on Tuesday after the pharmaceutical giant and medical device maker posted better-than-expected earnings and flagged strong sales growth in its first quarter.  J&J posted adjusted earnings of $2.70 a share for its latest quarter, narrowly beating out the $2.68 a share analysts had anticipated.  For the full year, J&J is targeting adjusted earnings of $11.45 to $11.65 a share, up slightly from a prior range of $11.43 to $11.63 a share.
